title: query_base input schema
description: Input contract for the query_base typed MCP tool. Authoritative source is the Zod schema in src/tools/query_base/schema.ts; this JSON Schema is the human-readable cross-reference and the form published via zodToJsonSchema at registration time.

base_path.description: Vault-relative path to the .base file. MUST end with .base (case-insensitive on the extension). MUST NOT contain path-traversal shapes (../, leading / or \, drive-letter prefix, control characters). Validation rejects with VALIDATION_ERROR + details.code: INVALID_BASE_PATH + details.reason in {empty, too-long, wrong-extension, path-traversal}. Layer 2 canonical-path check (post-validation) rejects symlink-escape with PATH_ESCAPES_VAULT.

view_name.description: Name of the view inside the .base file to query. Matched exact case-sensitive against the views declared in the file; no whitespace trim, no case-folding, no fuzzy matching. Validation rejects with VALIDATION_ERROR + details.code: INVALID_VIEW_NAME + details.reason in {empty, too-long}. Unknown view name (after passing schema validation) surfaces CLI_REPORTED_ERROR + details.code: VIEW_NOT_FOUND.

vault.description: Optional vault display name. When absent, routes to the focused vault (cohort default). When present, the supplied name is resolved via the project's lazy vault registry. Unknown vault surfaces CLI_REPORTED_ERROR + details.code: VAULT_NOT_FOUND + details.reason: unknown; closed-but-registered vault surfaces details.reason: not-open.
